assertions.reason: Enter-package screen rendered required copy, validator line, and CTA; clicking Apply Share Update navigated to /rotate-share/applying. No console/page errors observed.
Applying Share Update screen rendered Back to Settings, all 4 progress rows, rotate package chip, and Cancel Share Update button as specified. No console/page errors observed.

Failed screen rendered required warning and actions; no top Back to Settings link was present (anchor count 0). Retry navigated to /rotate-share/applying and Back to Rotate Share navigated to /rotate-share. No console/page errors observed.
Updated screen rendered success banner and identity changes panel including unchanged group key plus old/new share and profile IDs.
From /demo/rotate-share-updated, Return to Signer navigated to /dashboard/demo-profile and Signer Running was visible.
From /demo/rotate-share-applying, Cancel Share Update navigated to /rotate-share intake screen (Enter Rotate Package).

frictions: Using text-only selector for "Retry" was ambiguous because the warning copy also contains the word "retry"; resolved by targeting button role/name.
